

```{r}
################################################################################
# PROJECT: Structural and Temporal Constraints in Avian Erythrocytes
# SCRIPT:  01_Avian_Erythroid_Atlas_BoneMarrow.R
# 
# PURPOSE: Construction of the primary chicken bone marrow atlas. 
#          Covers raw data loading, QC, SCTransform integration, 
#          dimensionality reduction, and cell type annotation.
#
# REPRODUCIBILITY: 
#   - SCRIPT 1A: Seurat v4.1.3 (Legacy integration)
#   - SCRIPT 1B: Seurat v5.x / R 4.4.x compatible
################################################################################


# --- 1. Load All Required Libraries ---
library(Seurat)      # Single-cell RNA-seq analysis
library(glmGamPoi)   # Optimization for SCTransform
library(ggplot2)     # Plotting and themes
library(cowplot)     # Arranging multi-panel plots
library(dplyr)       # Data manipulation
library(patchwork)   # Plot combining
library(pheatmap)    # Heatmap generation
library(ggsci)       # Scientific color palettes
library(psych)       # Statistical tools
library(CytoTRACE)   # Stemness/maturation analysis
library(monocle3)    # Trajectory/Pseudotime analysis

# --- 2. Directory Setup ---
# Set working directory to the project root
# setwd("path/to/repository") 
if (!dir.exists("./Results")) dir.create("./Results")
if (!dir.exists("./Processed_Objects")) dir.create("./Processed_Objects")
if (!dir.exists("./Results/Result_Supporting_Files")) {
  dir.create("./Results/Result_Supporting_Files", recursive = TRUE)
}

# ==============================================================================
# SCRIPT 1A: RAW DATA PROCESSING & INTEGRATION (LEGACY SEURAT V4 REQUIRED)
# ==============================================================================

# 3. Load Raw 10X Genomics Data 
# NOTE: Download files from GEO GSE315210, rename to standard format 
# (matrix.mtx.gz, features.tsv.gz, barcodes.tsv.gz), and place in the folders below.

BM_1 <- Read10X("./Raw_Data/Primary_Avian_Marrow/BM_1/")
BM_2 <- Read10X("./Raw_Data/Primary_Avian_Marrow/BM_2/")

# Initialize Seurat Objects
scRNA.BM_1 <- CreateSeuratObject(BM_1, project = "BM_1", min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
scRNA.BM_2 <- CreateSeuratObject(BM_2, project = "BM_2", min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)

# Merge biological replicates for initial processing
BMscRNA <- merge(scRNA.BM_1, y = scRNA.BM_2)

# 4. QC Metric Calculation
# Mitochondrial genes for Gallus gallus (manually curated list)
mito_genes = c("ND1", "ND2", "COX1", "COII", "ATP8", "ATP6", "COX3", "ND3", "ND4L", "ND4", "ND5", "CYTB", "ND6")
rowSums(BMscRNA[mito_genes,])
mito_genes <- intersect(mito_genes,rownames(BMscRNA))
BMscRNA[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(BMscRNA, features = mito_genes)

# Hemoglobin genes for tracking erythroid content
HB.genes <- c("HBA1","HBAD","HBE1","HBBA")
HB_m <- match(HB.genes, rownames(BMscRNA@assays$RNA)) 
HB.genes <- rownames(BMscRNA@assays$RNA)[HB_m] 
HB.genes <- HB.genes[!is.na(HB.genes)] 
BMscRNA[["percent.HB"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(BMscRNA, features = HB.genes)

# Standardize replicate names
colnames(BMscRNA@meta.data)
table(BMscRNA@meta.data$orig.ident)
BMscRNA@meta.data$orig.ident <- factor(BMscRNA@meta.data$orig.ident, levels = c("BM_1", "BM_2", ordered = TRUE))

# 5. Pre-filtering QC Visualization
pdf("./Results/Supplementary Figure S1-A.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
vln_list_before <- lapply(
  c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt", "percent.HB"),
  function(f) VlnPlot(BMscRNA, features = f, group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size = 0.1) + ggtitle(f))
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = vln_list_before, ncol = 2)
dev.off()

# 6. Apply Filtering Criteria
# Thresholds defined to exclude low-quality cells, multiplets, and apoptotic cells
BMscRNA <- subset(BMscRNA, subset = nFeature_RNA > 300 & nFeature_RNA < 4000 & percent.mt < 20 & nCount_RNA > 1000)

# Post-filtering QC Visualization
pdf("./Results/Supplementary Figure S1-B.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
vln_list_after <- lapply(
  c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt", "percent.HB"),
  function(f) VlnPlot(BMscRNA, features = f, group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size = 0.1) + ggtitle(f))
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = vln_list_after, ncol = 2)
dev.off()

# 7. Normalization and Replicate Splitting
BMscRNA <- NormalizeData(BMscRNA, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
BMscRNA <- FindVariableFeatures(BMscRNA, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)  
BMscRNA <- CellCycleScoring(BMscRNA, s.features = cc.genes$s.genes, g2m.features = cc.genes$g2m.genes)


# 8. SCTransform Integration
# Regression of Cell Cycle scores ensures clusters represent developmental identity rather than proliferation.
BMscRNA_list <- SplitObject(BMscRNA, split.by = "orig.ident")
for(i in 1:length(BMscRNA_list)){
  BMscRNA_list[[i]] <- SCTransform(BMscRNA_list[[i]],
    variable.features.n = 2000,
    vars.to.regress = c("percent.mt", "S.Score", "G2M.Score"),
    verbose = FALSE)
}

# Anchor-based integration to harmonize biological replicates
features <- SelectIntegrationFeatures(object.list = BMscRNA_list, nfeatures = 2000)
anchors <- FindIntegrationAnchors(object.list = BMscRNA_list, anchor.features = features)
BMscRNA <- IntegrateData(anchorset = anchors)

DefaultAssay(BMscRNA) <- "integrated"
scale.genes <- rownames(BMscRNA)
BMscRNA <- ScaleData(BMscRNA, features = scale.genes)

# Save intermediate integrated object (Foundation for all downstream analysis)
save(BMscRNA, file = "./Processed_Objects/BMscRNA_integrated.RData")
# NOTE: It can also be downloaded from NCBI GEO (GSE315210_BMscRNA_integrated.rdata.gz) to skip SCRIPT 1A
```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# SCRIPT 1B: ATLAS ANNOTATION & CHARACTERIZATION (R 4.4.x COMPATIBLE)
# ==============================================================================

#Note Optional: Skip SCRIPT 1A
#To bypass the integration process and start directly with the annotated atlas:
#Download: GSE315210_BMscRNA_integrated.rdata.gz from NCBI GEO.
#Decompress & Rename: Rename the file to BMscRNA_integrated.RData.
#Placement: Place the file in the ./Processed_Objects/ directory.
#Execute: Run SCRIPT 1B of 01_Avian_Erythroid_Atlas_BoneMarrow.R.

# 9. Dimensionality Reduction
load("./Processed_Objects/BMscRNA_integrated.RData")

BMscRNA$orig.ident <- factor(BMscRNA$orig.ident, levels = c("BM_1", "BM_2"), ordered = T)
BMscRNA <- RunPCA(BMscRNA, Features = VariableFeatures(BMscRNA))

# Supplementary Visuals for PCA and Replicate Overlap
pdf("./Results/Supplementary Figure S1-C.pdf", width = 4, height = 4)
DimPlot(BMscRNA, reduction = "pca", group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size = 0.5, cols = c("darkorange", "darkgrey", "black", "yellow", "orange", "pink", "blue"))
dev.off()

# Elbow plot used to justify selection of 20 principal components for clustering
pdf("./Results/Supplementary Figure S1-D.pdf", width = 6, height = 4.5)
ElbowPlot(BMscRNA, ndims = 50, reduction = "pca")
dev.off()

# Clustering using SNN graph-based approach
BMscRNA <- FindNeighbors(BMscRNA, dims = 1:20)
BMscRNA <- FindClusters(BMscRNA, resolution = 0.50)

# 10. Clustering and Topology Visualization
pdf("./Results/Supplementary Figure S1-E.pdf")
DimHeatmap(BMscRNA, dims = 1:9, nfeatures = 10, cells = 500, balanced = TRUE)
dev.off()

# Secondary non-linear reductions (Supporting files)
set.seed(1)
BMscRNA <- RunTSNE(BMscRNA, dims = 1:20)
pdf("./Results/Result_Supporting_Files/BMscRNA_TSNE.pdf")
set.seed(120)
DimPlot(BMscRNA, reduction = "tsne")
dev.off()

set.seed(1)
BMscRNA <- RunUMAP(BMscRNA, dims = 1:20)
pdf("./Results/Result_Supporting_Files/BMscRNA_UMAP.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
set.seed(88)
Umap <- DimPlot(BMscRNA, reduction = "umap", label = T, label.size = 6) + 
  NoLegend() + 
  labs(x = "UMAP1", y = "UMAP2", title = "cell_type") +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", size = 1, linetype = "solid"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"))
Umap
dev.off()

# Save atlas before manual annotation
save(BMscRNA, file = "./Processed_Objects/BMscRNA_Processed.Rdata")

# 11. Marker Identification (Annotation Benchmarking)
load("./Processed_Objects/BMscRNA_Processed.Rdata")
BMscRNA <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(BMscRNA, assay = "SCT", verbose = TRUE)
BMscRNA.markers <- FindAllMarkers(BMscRNA,
  only.pos = TRUE, 
  min.pct = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25)
head(BMscRNA.markers)

# Save Cluster-specific markers for manuscript documentation
top25 <- BMscRNA.markers %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 20, wt = avg_log2FC)
write.csv(top25, file = "./Results/Supplementary Table 2.csv")

# 12. Cell Type Annotation (Manuscript Primary Figures)
DefaultAssay(BMscRNA) <- "RNA"
cluster2type <- c(
  "0" = "Late polychromatic blast",
  "1" = "Early polychromatic blast",
  "2" = "Late erythroblast",
  "3" = "Erythroid progenitor 1",
  "4" = "Mid polychromatic blast",
  "5" = "Erythroid progenitor 2",
  "6" = "Early erythroblast",
  "7" = "Hematopoietic stem cells",
  "8" = "Immature erythrocyte",
  "9" = "Thrombocyte precursor",
  "10" = "T cells",
  "11" = "Eosinophil",
  "12" = "Common myeloid progenitors",
  "13" = "B cells",
  "14" = "Mesenchymal stem cells",
  "15" = "Proliferating cells"
)
BMscRNA[['cell_type']] = unname(cluster2type[BMscRNA@meta.data$seurat_clusters])

# Define developmental order for factor levels
cluster_order <- c(
  "Immature erythrocyte", "Late polychromatic blast", "Mid polychromatic blast", 
  "Early polychromatic blast", "Late erythroblast", "Early erythroblast", 
  "Erythroid progenitor 2", "Erythroid progenitor 1", "Proliferating cells", 
  "Mesenchymal stem cells", "Hematopoietic stem cells", "T cells", 
  "Common myeloid progenitors", "Thrombocyte precursor", "Eosinophil", "B cells"
)
BMscRNA@meta.data$cell_type <- factor(BMscRNA@meta.data$cell_type, levels = cluster_order)

set.seed(111)
cluster_colors <- c(
  "#6B92B9", "#D48A9C", "#6F9CBE", "#9CAF74", "#C1B06D", 
  "#B5B500", "#BAB77C", "#D7868E", "#D46969", "#6BA0A7", 
  "#6BAFAD", "#A6A6A6", "#BF6E6E", "#A982B2", 
  "#88A1A8", "#A45757"
)

# Primary Bone Marrow Atlas UMAP
pdf("./Results/Figure-1A.pdf", width = 10, height = 7)
DimPlot(BMscRNA, 
        reduction = "umap", 
        group.by = "cell_type",
        label = TRUE, 
        label.size = 4,  
        pt.size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")) +  
  NoLegend()
dev.off()


# 13. Lineage Characterization (Violin and Feature Plots)
Idents(BMscRNA) <- BMscRNA@meta.data$cell_type
BMscRNA_red <- subset(
  BMscRNA, 
  idents = c(
    "Immature erythrocyte", "Late polychromatic blast", "Mid polychromatic blast",
    "Early polychromatic blast", "Late erythroblast", "Early erythroblast",
    "Erythroid progenitor 2", "Erythroid progenitor 1"
  )
)
DefaultAssay(BMscRNA_red) <- "SCT"
cluster_colors_red <- pal_lancet("lanonc")(length(unique(Idents(BMscRNA_red))))

# Curated markers for avian erythroid maturation
marker_genes_red <- c("ENSGALG00010001729", "RFESD", "CA13", 
                      "HBA1", "HBAD", "HBBA", "HBE1", "EPAS1", "CA2",
                      "PPOX", "FECH", "PON1",
                      "CHST2", "COQ9", "MPST", "MXD3")
min_cutoff <- 0
max_cutoff <- 10

pdf(file = "./Results/Supplementary Figure S2A.pdf", width = 12, height = 6)
for (gene in marker_genes_red) {
  violin_plot <- VlnPlot(
    BMscRNA_red, features = gene, pt.size = 0, cols = cluster_colors_red
  ) +
    labs(title = paste0("Violin Plot: ", gene), x = NULL, y = "Expression Level") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "none")
  
  feature_plot <- FeaturePlot(
    BMscRNA_red, features = gene, min.cutoff = min_cutoff, max.cutoff = max_cutoff,
    cols = c("lightgrey", "darkgreen", "darkred")
  ) +
    labs(title = paste0("Feature Plot: ", gene), x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
    print(plot_grid(violin_plot, feature_plot, labels = c("A", "B"), ncol = 2, align = "hv"))
}
dev.off()

# Non-erythroid lineage markers for Supplementary validation
BMscRNA_other <- subset(
  BMscRNA, 
  idents = c(
    "Proliferating cells", "Mesenchymal stem cells", "Hematopoietic stem cells", 
    "T cells", "Common myeloid progenitors", "Thrombocyte precursor", 
    "Eosinophil", "B cells"
  )
)

DefaultAssay(BMscRNA_other) <- "SCT"
cluster_colors_other <- pal_lancet("lanonc")(length(unique(Idents(BMscRNA_other))))
marker_genes_other <- c("MYOF", "ANXA2", "FN1",
                        "ANO3", "GP9", "ITGB3",
                        "BCL11B", "PRKCH", "TOX",
                        "EPX", "PGR2/3", "S100A12",
                        "HDC", "LSAMP", "ENSGALG00010002666",
                        "TXNDC5", "MZB1", "JCHAIN",
                        "PPARG", "ME1", "LRP5",
                        "NPM3", "LDHB", "CYCS")

pdf(file = "./Results/Supplementary Figure S2B.pdf", width = 12, height = 6)
for (gene in marker_genes_other) {
  violin_plot <- VlnPlot(
    BMscRNA_other, features = gene, pt.size = 0, cols = cluster_colors_other
  ) +
    labs(title = paste0("Violin Plot: ", gene), x = NULL, y = "Expression Level") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "none")
    feature_plot <- FeaturePlot(
    BMscRNA_other, features = gene, min.cutoff = min_cutoff, max.cutoff = max_cutoff,
    cols = c("lightgrey", "darkgreen", "darkred")
  ) +
    labs(title = paste0("Feature Plot: ", gene), x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
    print(plot_grid(violin_plot, feature_plot, labels = c("A", "B"), ncol = 2, align = "hv"))
}
dev.off()

#Multi-lineage Marker DotPlot
marker_genes_all <- c("ENSGALG00010001729", "RFESD", "CA13", "SLC7A7",
  "HBA1", "HBAD", "HBBA", "HBE1", "EPAS1", "CA2",
  "PPOX", "FECH", "PON1",
  "CHST2",
  "COQ9", "MPST", "MXD3",
  "MYOF", "ANXA2", "FN1",
  "ANO3", "GP9", "ITGB3",
  "BCL11B", "PRKCH", "TOX",
  "EPX", "PGR2/3", "S100A12",
  "HDC", "LSAMP", "ENSGALG00010002666",
  "TXNDC5", "MZB1", "JCHAIN",
  "PPARG", "ME1", "LRP5",
  "LDHB", "NPM3", "CYCS")
pdf("./Results/Figure-1B.pdf", height = 8, width = 16)
DotPlot(BMscRNA, features = marker_genes_all, 
        group.by = "cell_type",  # Use updated cell type labels
        dot.scale = 6, 
        cols = c("green", "red")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12))
while (!is.null(dev.list())) dev.off()

# 14. Maturation & Trajectory Modeling (CytoTRACE & Monocle3)
Idents(BMscRNA) <- "seurat_clusters"
BMscRNA_red <- subset(BMscRNA, idents = c("8","0","4", "1","2", "6", "5","3"))

# CytoTRACE: Predicts maturation based on transcriptomic diversity
mat <- as.matrix(BMscRNA_red@assays$RNA@counts)
cyto_results <- CytoTRACE(mat = mat)
phe <- as.character(BMscRNA_red$cell_type)
names(phe) <- rownames(BMscRNA_red@meta.data)
plotCytoGenes(cyto_results, numOfGenes = 10, outputDir = "./Results/cytotrace")
plotCytoTRACE(cyto_results, phenotype = phe, gene = "HBA1", outputDir = "./Results/cytotrace")
plotCytoTRACE(cyto_results, phenotype = phe, outputDir = "./Results/cytotrace")

# Monocle3: Pseudotime trajectory reconstruction
load("./Processed_Objects/BMscRNA_Processed.Rdata")
Idents(BMscRNA) <- "seurat_clusters"
BMscRNA_red <- subset(BMscRNA, idents = c("8","0","4", "1","2", "6", "5","3"))
expr_matrix <- as(as.matrix(BMscRNA_red@assays$RNA@counts), 'sparseMatrix')
cell_metadata <- BMscRNA_red@meta.data
gene_metadata <- data.frame(gene_short_name = rownames(expr_matrix), row.names = rownames(expr_matrix))
cds <- new_cell_data_set(expr_matrix, cell_metadata, gene_metadata)
cds <- preprocess_cds(cds, method = "PCA")
umap_coords <- Embeddings(BMscRNA_red, reduction = "umap")
reducedDims(cds)$UMAP <- umap_coords
cds <- cluster_cells(cds, reduction_method = "UMAP")
cds <- learn_graph(cds, use_partition = TRUE)
# --- Root Selection & Pseudotime Ordering ---
# NOTE: The following command will open an interactive window. 
# To reproduce the manuscript's trajectory, please select the 
# "Erythroid progenitor 1" cluster as the root (the starting point 
# of erythroid differentiation) and then click 'Done'.
cds <- order_cells(cds, reduction_method = "UMAP")


# Save Trajectory Plot after selection
pdf("./Results/Figure-1D.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
plot_cells(cds,
           reduction_method = "UMAP",
           color_cells_by = "pseudotime",
           label_groups_by_cluster = FALSE,
           label_leaves = FALSE,
           label_branch_points = FALSE)
dev.off()

```
